---
title: "Build Instructions"
lang: en
format: html
bibliography: references.bib
---

::: {.callout-note}
## 🇯🇵 日本語版 / Available in Japanese

日本語で読みたい方は [こちらのページ](build_ja.qmd) をご覧ください。  
Please see the [Japanese version](build_ja.qmd) for reading in Japanese.
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
This page is intended for developers.
:::

This section explains how to build the application.

The application is built using [PyInstaller](https://pyinstaller.org/en/stable/).

A pre-generated spec file is provided and should be used for building the application.  
Please note that this process can take some time (approximately 10 minutes).

```bash
pyinstaller build.spec
```
For more details on PyInstaller usage, please refer to the [official documentation](https://pyinstaller.org/en/stable/).

::: {.callout-important}
## Stable standalone builds (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Starting from **v1.0.0**, this repository provides a GitHub Actions release workflow:

- Workflow file: `.github/workflows/release-standalone.yml`
- Trigger: tag push such as `v1.0.0`
- Outputs:
  - `LeafShapeTool-windows-x64.zip`
  - `LeafShapeTool-macos-arm64.tar.gz`
  - `LeafShapeTool-macos-x64.tar.gz`
  - `LeafShapeTool-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz`

All generated assets are attached to the corresponding GitHub Release.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Removing Previous Builds

Before running PyInstaller, it is recommended to **remove any existing build artifacts**:

```bash
# PowerShell
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force build, dist

# Bash
rm -rf build dist
```

:::

## After Building

If the build completes successfully, the following directory structure will be generated at the project root:

```text
project/
├─ build/
└─ dist/
   └─ LeafShapeTool/
      ├─ LeafShapeTool(.exe)
      └─ _internal/
         └─ (library files)
```

The main executable is located under `dist/LeafShapeTool/`.

::: {.callout-caution}
To improve stability, the application is built in `onedir` mode instead of `onefile` mode.  
Therefore, the entire `dist/LeafShapeTool/` folder must be distributed together.
:::
